title: Investigate floor transition spawn position bug

log.context: Investigate floor transition spawn position bug

Done. Here's a summary of what was found and fixed:

**Bug:** Player spawned inside a wall on floor 2 (and would on floor 3 too).

**Root cause:** The dungeon client uses client-authoritative movement. In `dungeon-network.ts`'s `onTick` handler, when a tick arrives for the local player and an existing player record is found (`isLocal && old`), the server's x/y coordinates are discarded in favor of the client's local position. On floor transition, the old player record from the previous floor was...(truncated)
